creator: alexbl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note: I'm running with bschmidt's svn repo version of iwn, and I still see this behavior.

Whenever i do kldload if_iwn, and then ifconfig iwn0 up, I get a kernel panic. 

I have an intel 5300AGN. The crash dump is attached which seems to include the backtrace.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
